subject: Re: Washington DC
body:
forget it

----- Original Message ----
From: "lvjet@aol.com" <lvjet@aol.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, May 13, 2007 10:25:01 AM
Subject: Washington DC


White Pains, LaGuardia and Teterboro, are only NY area approved airports into DCA, plus other requirements listed below. 

Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld  

-----Original Message-----
From: "Mark Hudson" <mhudson@univ-wea.com>
Date: Sat, 12 May 2007 15:03:16 
To:<LVJET@AOL.COM>
Subject:

AIRCRAFT OPERATORS MUST:

   - FOLLOW A STRICT SECURITY PROTOCOL TO INCLUDE PASSENGER AND

     BAGGAGE SCREENING AS WELL AS CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD CHECKS

     FOR THE PILOTS. 

   - A LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER MUST BE ONBOARD EVERY FLIGHT.

   - PROVIDE AT LEAST 24 HRS ADVANCE NOTICE OF THEIR INTENT

     TO USE KDCA.

   - ARRIVE FROM ONE OF 15 PORTAL AIRPORTS IN THE U.S.:

     SEATTLE-TACOMA/SEA / BOSTON LOGAN/BOS / HOUSTON HOBBY/HOU

     WHITE PLAINS/HPN / LAGUARDIA/LGA / CHICAGO MIDWAY/MDW

     MINNEAPOLIS-ST PAUL/MSP / WEST PALM BEACH/PBI 

     SAN FRANCISCO/SFO / TETERBORO/TEB / PHILADELPHIA/PHL

     LEXINGTON/BLUE GRASS/LEX.

     AS OF 5 MAY 06 THE FOLLOWING GATEWAY AIRPORTS ARE ALSO 

     AUTHORIZED: DALLAS-LOVE FIELD/DAL / MEMPHIS INTL/MEM / 

     MILWAUKEE GENERAL MITCHELL FIELD/MKE.

C. TSA BEGAN ACCEPTING FLIGHT AUTHORIZATION REQUESTS FROM

   'APPROVED' OPERATORS ON OCT 15, 2005.

D. 24 HOURS OPERATIONS ARE POSSIBLE FOR:

   TAKEOFF/DEPARTURE IF 72 DBA OR LESS

   LANDING/ARRIVAL   IF 85 DBA OR LESS

 

 

Mark Hudson 

Licensed FAA Dispatcher

Senior Trip Support Specialist

Yellow Team

mailto:mhudson@univ-wea.com: <mailto:mhudson@univ-wea.com> 

mailto:tssyellow@univ-wea.com: <mailto:tssyellow@univ-wea.com> 

Ph 713 947 8831

Toll Free 1-866-935-8326 (YEL-TEAM)

Fx 713 943 4650 

<cid:image001.gif@01C794A6.ADC74C30> 

"Success From The Word GO"
